Terms

By continuing, you represent and warrant that you: (i) have full legal authority to bind the organisation / individual listed above to the Google Play Developer Distribution Agreement and the Play Console Terms of Service; (ii) have read and understood these Agreements; and (iii) agree to these Agreements on behalf of the company / individual

info
To create your account you'll need to pay a one-off USD 25 registration fee. You may be asked to verify your identity using a valid ID to complete your account registration. If we can't verify your identity, the registration fee won't be refunded.
